mapper.sql: FROM pt_coach_comment c JOIN pt_private_appointment a ON a.id = c.appointment_id LEFT JOIN pt_coach co ON co.id = c.coach_id LEFT JOIN store s ON s.storeId = a.store_id

c.id, c.appointment_id AS appointmentId, c.coach_id AS coachId, co.coach_name AS coachName, c.member_id AS memberId, c.member_nickname AS memberNickname, c.member_mobile AS memberMobile, CONCAT(IFNULL(c.member_nickname, ''), CASE WHEN c.member_mobile IS NULL OR c.member_mobile = '' THEN '' ELSE CONCAT(' ', c.member_mobile) END) AS memberInfo, c.score AS score, c.comment_content AS commentContent, c.reply_status AS replyStatus, c.handle_status AS handleStatus, c.handle_remark AS handleRemark, a.store_id AS storeId, s.storeName AS storeName, DATE_FORMAT(c.comment_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS commentTime

sql.if: AND (c.member_nickname LIKE concat('%', #{memberKeyword}, '%') OR c.member_mobile LIKE concat('%', #{memberKeyword}, '%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT
c.deleted = 0
ORDER BY c.comment_time DESC, c.id DESC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT
WHERE c.id = #{id} AND c.deleted = 0
AND a.store_id IN (${storeIds})
LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM pt_coach_comment c JOIN pt_private_appointment a ON a.id = c.appointment_id WHERE c.id = #{id} AND c.deleted = 0
AND a.store_id IN (${storeIds})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pt_coach_comment (appointment_id, coach_id, member_id, member_nickname, member_mobile, score, comment_content, comment_time) VALUES (#{appointmentId}, #{coachId}, #{memberId}, #{memberNickname}, #{memberMobile}, #{score}, #{commentContent}, NOW())
mapper.update:
UPDATE pt_coach_comment
handle_status = #{handleStatus}, handle_remark = #{handleRemark}, comment_content = #{commentContent},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE pt_coach_comment SET reply_status = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
